LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DAVID SCOTT CACCHIONE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD THE UNDERLYING FRAUD WITH SUFFICIENT SPECIFICITY AND TO PLEAD FACTS SHOWING THE EXISTENCE OF A FIDUCIARY DUTY. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN CSR# 8189 301/PJB
